errors.routeDescription: We could not open this section. Try again or return to the dashboard.
errors.notFoundDescription: The address may have changed, or the page no longer exists.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose a light, dark, or system-matched interface.

language.title: Language
language.description: Language and locale formatting apply across the current route.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Local demo preferences are stored only in this browser.
notifications.emailDescription: Receive general product updates by email in this demo preference set.
notifications.productsDescription: Keep low-stock and catalog alerts enabled.

profile.title: Profile information
profile.description: Validate a local-only administrator profile without a remote mutation.
profile.avatarDescription: Initials update from the form. No image is uploaded or sent.
profile.localOnly: This demo action is local-only and does not update a server.

errors.firstName: Enter at least two characters for the first name.
errors.lastName: Enter at least two characters for the last name.
errors.role: Enter at least two characters for the role.

reset.title: Reset preferences
reset.description: Restore theme, language, notifications, sidebar, and table-column preferences to defaults.
reset.confirmDescription: This clears the saved interface preferences in this browser. Remote data is not changed.

trend.title: Revenue and order trend
trend.description: Discounted revenue and order count across the same deterministic 2025 demo months.
trend.insight: The two series share month buckets but use separate axes; the view describes volume and value without claiming causation.
trend.summary: Highest monthly revenue: {revenue}; highest monthly order count: {orders}.

users.title: Cumulative users
users.description: Running total from deterministic user indexed months.
users.insight: The line accumulates indexed demo records and is not a real registration timeline.

categories.title: Popular categories
categories.description: Top catalog categories ranked by sold quantity in order lines, plus Other.
categories.insight: Category popularity uses item quantity, not catalog size or product rating.

countries.title: Audience by country
countries.description: Top normalized address countries plus Other.
countries.insight: Country counts reflect the current DummyJSON user sample and are not market-share estimates.

products.title: Top-selling products
products.description: Products ranked by quantity; discounted line revenue is available in the tooltip and summary.
products.insight: Ranking uses summed cart-line quantity with product ID as a stable tie-breaker.

states.partialError: Some analytics sources are unavailable. Available charts remain visible and missing data is not presented as factual.
states.errorDescription: The required public datasets are unavailable. Check the connection and retry.

lowStock.label: Low-stock products
lowStock.context: Stock at or below 10, including zero

charts.revenueDescription: Discounted revenue grouped by deterministic 2025 demo month.
charts.statusDescription: Distribution of deterministic demo fulfillment statuses.
charts.countryDescription: Top countries from normalized user addresses, plus Other.
charts.categoryDescription: Catalog count by category, limited to top groups plus Other.
charts.productsDescription: Products ranked by quantity across cart line items.

activity.label: Recently indexed demo data
activity.demoNote: These lists use descending source ID because the APIs do not provide creation timestamps.

states.refreshing: Refreshing dashboard data in the background…
states.partialError: Some source data is unavailable. Available panels remain usable and missing values are not presented as factual.
states.errorDescription: The required public datasets are unavailable. Check the connection and retry.

toolbar.searchPlaceholder: Order ID, customer, email, or product
toolbar.dateError: The start date cannot be after the end date.

states.remoteEmptyDescription: The API returned an empty carts dataset.
states.filteredEmptyDescription: Adjust the search criteria or clear filters.
states.invalidRangeDescription: Choose a valid demo date range to see orders.
states.errorDescription: Check your connection and retry. Customer joins are loaded once with the order dataset.

details.noLines: This order has no product lines.
details.demoNote: Status and date are deterministic demo fields because DummyJSON carts do not provide them. Revenue uses the discounted total.

toolbar.priceError: Minimum price cannot exceed maximum price.

states.remoteEmptyDescription: The API returned an empty product catalog.
states.filteredEmptyDescription: Adjust the search or clear filters to see the catalog again.
states.errorDescription: Check your connection and retry the request.

details.note: The indexed date is a deterministic demo field because the source API does not provide creation dates.

toolbar.searchPlaceholder: Name, email, phone, company, or country

table.selectPage: Select rows on the current page
table.name: Full name

states.remoteEmptyDescription: The API returned an empty dataset. Filters stay available, but there is nothing to show right now.
states.filteredEmptyDescription: Adjust the search criteria or clear filters to see users again.
states.errorDescription: Check the connection or retry the request. Technical API details are kept out of the UI.

details.demoNote: Status and indexed date are deterministic demo fields because the source API does not provide them.
